peer_group_definition: Series A/B B2B software companies with visible engineering hiring signals
prospect_position_summary: The prospect appears interested in growth but lacks strong public evidence of scaled hiring maturity.

gap_findings.title: Hiring signal visibility gap
gap_findings.description: Peers show clearer engineering growth signals than the prospect.

recommended_hook: Lead with a grounded observation about growth pressure and offer help scaling delivery without slowing hiring.
